introSection: Happy Caterpillar is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently located at South Parade Pier in Portsmouth, Hampshire, England, UK. It opened in 2020.
fullText: Happy Caterpillar is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently located at South Parade Pier in Portsmouth, Hampshire, England, UK. It opened in 2020.
